understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on the current level (BP35) without dying, using the limited turns/attempts, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can take a directional move (e.g., MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) or CLICK a target tile. Movement shifts the player one tile if possible, then gravity (currently DOWN) causes the player to fall until supported/blocked, which can result in larger position changes than a single step. CLICK targets a clickable/removable tile at the specified [x,y]; it removes that tile (and any linked clickable removals) and can change the environment so that gravity immediately pulls the player, sometimes moving them significantly vertically. Landing on a spike tile ends the attempt immediately (run failure) and restarts the level, with 2 attempts per level and 50 turns per attempt. Undo was not used in the observed sequence, but would revert prior actions/board state if available.

moving_platform.warning: URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 4 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
